---
title: Core pillars of the AI Strategy
author: "Stefan Langenbach"
date: "2026-03-16"
lang: en-US
format:
    typst:
        papersize: a4
        margin:
            x: 2cm
            y: 0cm
        # TODO: Pick same font as reveal.js slides
        # mainfont: "Roboto"
        columns: 2
        toc: false
        number-sections: false
        page-numbering: false

---

# Purpose

Enable all employees to solve their domain-specific business challenges using AI.

# Organization

- Build a decentralized core team of 3 individuals to focus on use case identification, stakeholder management, and AI education?

# Roadmap

## Short (1-3 month)

- Define
- tbd

## Mid (4 -8 months)

## Long (9+ months)



# Priority Business Areas

Customer Care
HR
Software Engineering/IT

# Success Metrics & KPIs

- Focus on engagement, impact and momentum

# Build-vs-buy

- Timeline to value
- Total Costs of Ownership
- Lock-in risk

# Stakeholder Management

- C-Level: Briefings
- TechOps: BI-weekly
- Departments: Office Hours
